# Spires Digital

> Data-driven digital marketing agency based in Guernsey, Channel Islands and Lichfield, Staffordshire, UK. We help businesses grow through transparent, performance-focused PPC management, Meta Ads, affiliate marketing, and Shopify development.

## About

Spires Digital is a digital marketing agency with over 15 years of experience managing more than £10M in ad spend across 150+ campaigns. We operate on a growth partnership model — our pricing is structured so our success is tied directly to yours: £1,200/month base fee plus 5% of profitable revenue we generate.

We are a Google Partner, Bing Ads Certified, GA4 Expert, Shopify Partner, Meta Business Partner, and AWIN Certified Agency.

Key principles:
- Full transparency: clients own all their advertising accounts and have complete access to every metric
- No long-term contracts: month-to-month agreements with 30 days notice
- Data-driven: every strategy is backed by analytics and performance data
- Results-focused: we optimise for business outcomes (revenue, leads, profit), not vanity metrics

Contact: jack@spiresdigital.com
Location: Guernsey, Channel Islands & Lichfield, Staffordshire, United Kingdom
Website: https://spiresdigital.com
Book a call: https://calendly.com/jack-spiresdigital/30min

## Services

### PPC Management (Google & Bing Ads)
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/services/ppc-management/
Expert management of Google Ads and Bing Ads campaigns including Search, Shopping, Display, YouTube, Performance Max, and Demand Gen. Average 250% ROAS improvement across our client portfolio. Services include campaign strategy, keyword research, ad copy creation, conversion tracking setup, bid management, A/B testing, and monthly reporting with strategy calls.
Pricing: £1,200/month + 5% of profitable revenue generated.

### Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram)
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/services/meta-ads/
Full-funnel Facebook and Instagram advertising including campaign strategy, audience targeting, creative testing, retargeting, Advantage+ Shopping campaigns, catalogue/shopping ads, UGC sourcing, and Conversions API setup. Systematic A/B testing framework to identify and scale winning creative.
Pricing: £1,200/month + 5% of profitable revenue generated.

### Affiliate Management
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/services/affiliate-management/
Complete affiliate program setup and management on AWIN, CJ Affiliate, Rakuten, and Impact networks. Includes partner recruitment, commission structure design, creative asset provision, performance monitoring, coupon policing, fraud prevention, and compliance management.
Pricing: £1,200/month + 5% of profitable revenue generated.

### Shopify Website Builds
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/services/shopify-builds/
Custom Shopify store development including theme customisation or bespoke builds, checkout optimisation, payment gateway integration, migration from other platforms (WooCommerce, Magento), speed optimisation, and ongoing support. Typical project timeline: 4-8 weeks.
Pricing: Standard stores from £3,000, custom builds from £5,000+, ongoing support from £300/month.

## Industry Expertise

### E-Commerce
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/industries/ecommerce/
Specialist in Google Shopping, Performance Max, Meta catalogue ads, Advantage+ Shopping, and affiliate programs for online retailers.

### SaaS
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/industries/saas/
B2B lead generation, demo booking campaigns, and targeted advertising for software companies.

### Local Business
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/industries/local-business/
Local PPC, Google Business Profile optimisation, geo-targeted advertising, and call tracking for service-area businesses.

## Case Study Results (anonymised)
- E-Commerce: 250% ROAS increase, 68% CPA reduction, 3.2x revenue growth
- SaaS: 3x lead increase, 45% CPC reduction, 2.8x pipeline growth
- Local Services: 340% organic traffic increase, #1 local rankings, 180% lead increase
- Retail Affiliate: 25% revenue share from affiliate channel, 120+ active partners, 8.5x program ROI
- E-Commerce Migration: 2.1x conversion rate after Shopify migration, 65% faster load time
- DTC Brand: 5x ROAS on Meta, 42% lower CPA, 4x ad spend scaled

## Topics We Cover
PPC management, Google Ads, Bing Ads, Meta Ads, Facebook advertising, Instagram advertising, affiliate marketing, affiliate program management, Shopify development, Shopify builds, e-commerce, conversion rate optimisation, landing page optimisation, remarketing, retargeting, Google Shopping, Performance Max, Demand Gen, YouTube advertising, Advantage+ Shopping, Conversions API, Klaviyo email marketing, Shopify SEO, checkout optimisation, A/B testing, digital marketing strategy, marketing attribution, budget allocation, B2B marketing, lead generation, local PPC, international e-commerce
